entities.name: PEARL MILLET
entities.description: Six cultivars and four hybrids of Pennisetum americanum studied for yield and water relations

entities.name: GRAIN YIELD
entities.description: The measure of grain production found to be significantly correlated with leaf diffusion resistance

entities.name: LEAF DIFFUSION RESISTANCE
entities.description: Average afternoon leaf diffusion resistance of the abaxial surface (LDRab)

entities.name: IRRIGATED CONDITIONS
entities.description: Field conditions where water is supplied, showing a correlation of r = -0.90 between grain yield and LDRab

entities.name: NONIRRIGATED CONDITIONS
entities.description: Field conditions where water is not supplied, showing a correlation of r = -0.72 between grain yield and LDRab
